description_long: This is a tall, multi-level shelving unit with a modern, open-frame design. The structure features three main horizontal platforms, each supported by a white vertical frame on one side and transparent glass or acrylic panels on the other. The shelves themselves appear to be made of wood, with a warm, natural finish, and are bordered by sleek, dark railings for added safety and style. The transparent side panels provide visibility and a sense of openness, while the staggered arrangement of the shelves creates visual interest and functional separation. The overall look is contemporary and would suit urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, modern shelving unit with wooden shelves, white framing, and transparent side panels, featuring a staggered, open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, three wooden shelves, and transparent side panels with dark railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered shelf arrangement and the depth of the transparent panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white frame and the back edges of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the uppermost shelf and the clear, open structure.
